step_rationale: NF-κB inhibitor; suppresses NLRP3 and prothrombotic phenotype; cardioprotective.
mechanism: SIRT1 deacetylates NF-κB to suppress plaque inflammation and prothrombotic signaling, while preventing oxidized-LDL-induced endothelial dysfunction and cardiomyocyte injury.
